page.content: The table presents enzyme activity (nkat mg−1) across various substrates with specific measurements for each enzyme. For the substrate NodSm-V(C16 : 2, S), the enzyme activity for MtNFH1b is recorded at 154.1 ± 28.2, while the other enzymes (MtCHIT5a, MtCHIT5b, MtCRA1, MtCRA2, and LjCHIT5) show ND values, with the assay method being reverse-phase HPLC analysis (C18 column).

page.content: The substrate NodSm-IV(C16 : 2, S) shows an enzyme activity of 116.7 ± 3.4 for MtNFH1b, with all other enzymes reporting ND. The substrates NodRlv-V(C18 : 4, Ac) and NodRlv-IV(C18 : 4, Ac) show ND across all enzyme activities. The substrate (GlcNAc)6 exhibits enzyme activities of 368.2 ± 7.5 for MtCHIT5a, 138.4 ± 19.3 for MtCHIT5b, and 375.2 ± 5.1 for LjCHIT5, with other enzymes reporting ND, using reverse-phase HPLC analysis (amino column). Colloidal chitin shows enzyme activities of 0.013 ± 0.009 for MtCHIT5a, 0.007 ± 0.006 for MtCHIT5b, and 0.046 ± 0.015 for LjCHIT5, with ND for the others, assessed via Ehrlich's reagent. Glycol chitin indicates 12.2 ± 0.3 for MtCHIT5a, 4.4 ± 0.3 for MtCHIT5b, and 14.2 ± 0.7 for LjCHIT5, while CM–chitin–RBV shows 0.80 ± 0.12 for MtCHIT5a, 1.44 ± 0.02 for MtCHIT5b, and 0.75 ± 0.06 for LjCHIT5, assessed by a colorimetric assay. Lastly, M. lysodeikticus cells show ND across all enzyme activities, determined through a lysozyme assay.
